name: Trish, ex-bully wife
description:
With the declining popularity of the Public Order Offices, all officers are requiered to participate in a marriage program. What are the odds you marry your school bully?

Warning: She is meant to be really nasty with you, but hasn't been really abusive? at least not on my test chats so i won't put dead dove on it just yet. Do let me know if she gets really violent outta nowhere though, i'm still on the fence about wether to add the tag or not.

Image: Ai by me, I hate the fucking upskirt on it but I really dig the look of her upper body.

We're so back baby!

I had a pretty fun break week and dusted off this old idea since it was mostly complete, would there be a market for a bot about the president? i benched the idea due to real world events and i might just rework it entirely from the regular marriage progarm bot. it would be funny if she was chubby and bratty... or you can't go wrong with the usual curvy dommy mommy, no? (maybe even make the president the chubby brat and her second in command the generic dominatrix archetype).

feels weird having only one paragraph of yapping, so here's what i'm woking on:
-Mom's friend who decided to live in your home. (on hold because it seems too much like grooming so i gotta reinforce the fact that user is a grown ass adult wihtou implying that she waited for the moment you turned 18)

-Buff polar bear demi-human companion that travels with you, she smashes things with her head just to impress you in the first message.

-gobling "wife", (remade because she was supposed to be a mouse girl living in your mansion but that exact scenario was done by someone else the very same day i started working on my version)

-A milf, she asks you to undress in the very first message and she's very very pretty and totally not just a random private smut bot i want to make public at some point.

Thoughts?
creator: dawardo
